emails.subject: RE: Colorado GCA Rules
emails.body: I forwarded them our comments and characterized them as being supportive. To: Neustaedter, Robert; Kaufman, Paul; Whitt, Mark; Kingerski, Harry

emails.subject: RE: Colorado GCA Rules
emails.body: you spin miester you! HOw did your meeting go with the Wyoming guys? To: Landwehr, Susan M.; Neustaedter, Robert; Kaufman, Paul; Kingerski, Harry

emails.subject: RE: Colorado GCA Rules
emails.body: Really well. We are probably going to have another meeting on the 30th of October. Jake Thomas and Steve Walton are going to attend. To: Whitt, Mark

emails.subject: RE: Colorado GCA Rules
emails.body: I don't know if you've worked with Walton before, but if not, you'll find that he is really well versed in transmission issues throughout the west. I think he worked for Pacificorp for quite a few years. To: Landwehr, Susan M.
